exercises.answer: She has just found out about this.

ru.question: Она только что узнала об этом.
ru.explanation: Present Perfect с just для только что произошедшего события.

exercises.answer: Have you ever run a marathon?

exercises.answer: He hasn't signed the contract yet.

exercises.answer: I have already sent the application.
